examples.boringCn: 李明走出教学楼。他碰到了好友平阳。
examples.boringEn: Li Ming walked out of the school building. He bumped into his good friend Ping Yang.
examples.goodCn: 一走出教学楼，李明就碰到了多日不见的好友平阳。
examples.goodEn: As soon as he walked out of the school building, Li Ming bumped into his good friend Ping Yang.
examples.techniqueCn: 用「一 …… 就」表示动作紧接的关联词开头
examples.techniqueEn: Use the 一/就 ('as soon as / immediately') pair to chain consecutive actions

examples.boringCn: 我拼命冲向电梯。电梯门还是在我面前关上了。
examples.boringEn: I dashed towards the lift desperately. The lift doors still closed in front of me.
examples.goodCn: 虽然我拼命冲过去制止，但是电梯门还是在我面前紧紧地关上了。
examples.goodEn: Although I dashed over desperately to stop it, the lift doors still closed tightly in front of me.
examples.techniqueCn: 用「虽然 …… 但是」表示转折关系开头
examples.techniqueEn: Open with 虽然/但是 ('Although / but') to show a contrast or unexpected result

examples.boringCn: 我看到他们拿出手机。我露出羡慕的目光。
examples.boringEn: I saw them take out their mobile phones. I showed an envious look.
examples.goodCn: 每当看到同学们拿出最新款的手机，我都不由得露出羡慕的目光。
examples.goodEn: Whenever I saw my classmates take out the latest mobile phones, I couldn't help but show an envious look.
examples.techniqueCn: 用「每当 …… 都」表示经常发生的条件开头
examples.techniqueEn: Use 每当/都 ('Whenever / always') to describe a recurring situation

examples.boringCn: 我以为我很了解她。那一天我改变了想法。
examples.boringEn: I thought I knew her well. That day I changed my mind.
examples.goodCn: 直到那一天发生了一件小事，我才真正了解她是一个善解人意的好女孩。
examples.goodEn: It was not until a small incident happened that day that I truly understood she was an understanding and kind girl.
examples.techniqueCn: 用「直到 …… 才」强调事情发生的转折点
examples.techniqueEn: Start with 直到/才 ('Not until / then') to emphasize a turning point

examples.boringCn: 我断断续续讲报告。同学们开始窃窃私语。
examples.boringEn: I gave the report haltingly. The classmates started whispering.
examples.goodCn: 当我断断续续讲报告时，同学们开始窃窃私语。
examples.goodEn: When I gave the report haltingly, the classmates started whispering.
examples.techniqueCn: 用「当 …… 时」表示时间背景开头
examples.techniqueEn: Open with 当/时 ('When...') to set the time context

examples.boringCn: 我得到了教训。我明白了互相合作的重要性。
examples.boringEn: I learned a lesson. I understood the importance of cooperation.
examples.goodCn: 自从经过那次惨痛的教训以后，我深深明白了互相合作的重要性。
examples.goodEn: Ever since that painful lesson, I have deeply understood the importance of cooperation.
examples.techniqueCn: 用「自从 …… 以后」交代事情带来的长远影响
examples.techniqueEn: Use 自从/以后 ('Ever since') to show the long-term impact of an event
